summary: Plan-only PR inventory classification. No GitHub mutations are proposed. Security-sensitive PRs are scoped to route_security; already-closed PR #75212 is kept closed; remaining open non-security PRs are kept as independent or related work because this shard has no shared canonical and close/merge/fix paths are not enabled.

actions.reason: Already closed; keep historical superseded classification only.
